author: maxine--plan-050
content: Covers REQ-3, AC-7 through AC-9. Three parts: (1) startup sync before App::new() (~30 lines), (2) periodic 30s background sync using mpsc channel pattern from agents_tab.rs (~80 lines), (3) global 'r' keybinding for manual sync+refresh (~20 lines). No tab currently uses bare 'r'. SyncManager can run on background thread safely since hub cache worktree is separate from working tree.
